description: قراءة Access Token و Page ID من ملف social_tokens.json

import json

    data = json.load(f)
print('Keys found:', list(data.keys()))
if 'facebook_access_token' in data:
    token = data['facebook_access_token']
    print(f'facebook_access_token: {token[:20]}...{token[-10:]}')
    print(f'Token length: {len(token)}')
else:
